title: FancyMenu System Interactions Addon
description: Addon for FancyMenu to interact with the user's OS.
body:
# About This addon for FancyMenu allows modpack creators to create even more complex menu designs! It adds actions to interact with the user's operating system, like executing commands, downloading files, moving files and more. Of course this can be used for malicious actions, which is why all features of this addon are **OPT-IN**! Every individual Minecraft user (by UUID) gets asked if they want to enable or disable the addon on first launch, which makes it **impossible to ship a config** with the addon pre-enabled.
This addon **remains disabled** until the user **explicitly** chooses to enable it by clicking on the 'Enable' button. # Features - "Copy File/Folder" action - "Delete File/Folder" action - "Download File" action - "Move File/Folder" action - "Open File/Folder" action - "Rename File/Folder" action - "Unpack ZIP File" action - "Execute CMD/Terminal Command" action # Copyright FancyMenu System Interactions Addon Copyright © 2024 Keksuccino.
FancyMenu System Interactions Addon is licensed under DSMSLv2 (DON'T SNATCH MA STUFF LICENSE V2.0).
See [LICENSE.md](https://github.com/Keksuccino/FancyMenu-System-Interactions-Addon/blob/main/LICENSE.md) for more information about the license. ## **Support us** [![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/d559b544-474c-4109-b861-1b2e6ca6026a.webp "Bisect Hosting")](https://bisecthosting.com/crystalspider)
